remote_log_packet_t(3) Library Functions Manual remote_log_packet_t(3)

NAME

remote_log_packet_t - Remote log packet structure carrying log level and message text.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/packet/packet.h>

Data Fields


uint8_t log_level
Log level associated with the message (log_level_t cast to uint8_t). uint8_t direction
Direction hint so receivers can annotate origin. uint16_t flags
Additional flags (REMOTE_LOG_FLAG_*). uint32_t message_length
Message payload length in bytes (0-512).

Detailed Description

Remote log packet structure carrying log level and message text.

Definition at line 741 of file packet.h.

Field Documentation

uint8_t remote_log_packet_t::direction

Direction hint so receivers can annotate origin.
